ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Employer of the employee */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Years of service completed by the employee */,
  "year_of_retirement" INTEGER /* Year the employee retired */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "date_of_employment" TEXT /* Date when the employee was employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pensions" (
  "pension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pension record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee associated with the pension */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pension plan */,
  "total_pension" REAL /* Total pension amount awarded */,
  "pension_type" TEXT /* Type of pension (e.g., retirement, disability) */,
  "eligibility_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee is eligible for pension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pensions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES pension_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pensions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee receiving the benefits */,
  "benefits_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefits provided to the employee */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, life insurance) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pension_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pension plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the pension plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pension plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of pension plan (e.g., defined benefit, defined contribution) */,
  "vesting_period" INTEGER /* Number of years required for vesting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., HR Manager, Administrator) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role in the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retirement_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retirement event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee retiring */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the retirement event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., retirement, early retirement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retirement_events_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pension_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pension review */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pension plan being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes or outcomes from the review */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the pension plan (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pension_reviews_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES pension_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pension_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee making the contribution */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pension_contributions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pension_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pension adjustment */,
  "pension_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pension being adjusted */,
  "adjustment_amount" REAL /* Amount of adjustment made (positive for increases, negative for decreases) */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the adjustment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., cost of living, salary increase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pension_adjustments_pension_id FOREIGN KEY ("pension_id") REFERENCES pensions ("pension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grievances" (
  "grievance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grievance */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee filing the grievance */,
  "grievance_date" TEXT /* Date when the grievance was filed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grievance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the grievance (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grievance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grievances_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grievance_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "grievance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grievance being responded to */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the grievance was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grievance_responses_grievance_id FOREIGN KEY ("grievance_id") REFERENCES grievances ("grievance_id")
)
